title: LLM attention tail measurement gate
hypothesis: The merged attention-tail benchmark should collect scheduler evidence across LLM-like softmax tails before selecting any softmax architecture proposal.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Which current architecture point best supports LLM attention-tail scheduling evidence?
include: softmax occupancy, stall buckets, overlap, and backpressure evidence
exclude: new softmax datapath changes in this measurement gate
promotion of a candidate architecture before evidence review

expected_benefit: rank existing architecture points on attention-tail workloads
identify whether softmax occupancy or scheduler stalls dominate the next architecture step
produce reviewable evidence for the LLM architecture ladder
risks: measurement-only evidence may not isolate one architectural bottleneck
broad ranking without a paired baseline can defer proposal judgment
